---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new content for the workshop
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like:**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Proposal

**Which part does this relate to?**
- [ ] Part 1 - Fundamentals
- [ ] Part 2 - Advanced Operations
- [ ] Workshop Infrastructure (setup scripts, Dockerfile, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Presentation Slides
- [ ] Other: ___________

**What would you like to add/change?**

Provide details about your proposed feature or improvement.

## Use Case

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Workshop participants
- [ ] Workshop instructors
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Self-learners

**How does this improve the workshop experience?**

## Examples

**Do you have examples from other resources?**
Links, screenshots, or descriptions of similar features in other workshops/courses.

## Implementation Ideas

**How might this be implemented?**
If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, share them here.

## Alternative Solutions

**Describe alternatives you've considered:**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I would be willing to implement this feature
- [ ] I would be willing to help test this feature
- [ ] I'm just suggesting the idea
